Certified health coach and private chef bringing Korean heritage, wellness, and hospitality together.

Our Story
"Food has always been at the center of my life."

From my grandmother's table to my father's kitchen wisdom, I learned that cooking is about far more than a meal. It is about connection, heritage, and healing, and it shaped everything I now bring to coaching, private dining, and the way I gather people together.

Read Her Full Story →
"I believe nourishment is about more than food. It is about caring for the whole person, body, mind, and spirit. Inspired by generations of family tradition, guided by the wisdom of my parents, and shaped by my own journey of growth and healing. I help people cultivate wellness through food, connection, and self-discovery. Through nourishing meals, meaningful conversations, and holistic practices, I empower individuals to find balance, embrace their strengths, and live with purpose, vitality, and joy." Nourish. Connect. Heal. Thrive. Shelley Suh, Founder
